name: ticktick-mcp-bridge
description: Self-hosted TickTick MCP server for ChatGPT, Codex, and other MCP clients.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/mcp-handler.mjs && node --check src/transports/stdio.mjs && node --check src/tools.mjs && node --check src/ticktick-api.mjs && node --check src/auth-store.mjs && node --check scripts/test-inbox.mjs
